prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap consumer staples like Procter & Gamble, I estimated a 7-day standard deviation of approximately 2.5% of the current price (~$4.09). The point estimate assumes slight upward drift typical of established dividend stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normal distribution of returns, with wider intervals reflecting increased uncertainty over the 7-day horizon.
